hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py) cd /Users/obito/dev/ai-tool-demo/agent && uv run ruff format "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd /Users/obito/dev/ai-tool-demo && pnpm exec eslint --fix "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
